evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full review fixing all react skill rules

assertions.description: Parallelize independent fetches with Promise.all / start-early-await-late
React.cache() for per-request deduplication in server components

assertions.trap: cookies() in page makes route dynamic
assertions.description: Flag cookies()/headers() in layouts — explain dynamic blast radius

assertions.trap: useEffect to compute totalRevenue from orders
assertions.description: Derive state during render, never in effects

assertions.trap: useEffect depends on user object, not user.id
assertions.description: Primitive values as effect dependencies, not objects
useState(() => fn) initializer for SSR-unsafe/expensive defaults
useTransition for non-urgent state updates instead of manual loading booleans
useRef for transient high-frequency values (mouse position)
Build Map/index for repeated collection lookups
Combine chained filter/map/reduce into single loop for large arrays
Hoist RegExp creation outside component functions
Ternary operator for conditional rendering, not &&
next/dynamic or React.lazy for heavy/rarely-used components

assertions.trap: No preload on modal trigger hover
All data passed from server to single client component
assertions.description: Minimize data passed from server to client; avoid duplicate serialization
useEffect with [] is NOT componentDidMount — runs after paint

assertions.trap: Long list of orders rendered without virtualization hint
assertions.description: content-visibility: auto for long off-screen lists
